title: Next round of US-Iran talks to take place in Pakistan on Monday, Iranian sources say
snippet: Iranian sources tell CNN: US and Iranian delegations expected to arrive in Pakistan this weekend, hold negotiations Monday April 21. Trump signals he expects peace deal 'in coming days'. Coincides with ceasefire expiry date.
tag_reason: 2차 회담의 구체적 일정(4월 21일 월요일)이 최초로 확인된 신규 정보
